data.content: Implementation review approved. All requirements met: install/uninstall/update commands for Codex, Claude, and OpenCode with project-level preference and user-level fallback; eligibility detection based on root existence; interactive prompts for missing skills during update; doctor checks and fix wiring; README updates. Code is well-structured with clean module separation (all files under 500 lines). 17 unit tests + 3 integration tests provide thorough coverage. make sanity passes clean at 95.08% coverage. Minor note: SkillLocation.scope field is defined but unused — not a blocker.
